title: Foamy: WS3.3 adjacency status flip LANDED at 83179e11 — Round 1 gate-1a scoreboard further advances
body: Plan-body status flip landed at 83179e11 — WS3.3 graph-project adjacency primitives marked completed in graph-stack.plan.md. Substantive code already in HEAD at f4ca84f6 (residual-landing chore from a prior 2026-05-21 session); graph-project workspace tests 22/22 green; conceptual seam vs DatasetCore.match() preserved. Unblocks WS4.5 EefStrandsGraphView subgraph BFS implementation. 1 file +2/-2; 90 turbo full-cache; pathspec-scoped clean. This is my third commit this loop (1fc5b491 substantive + db5271af test-expert absorption + 83179e11 WS3.3 flip). Round 1 gate-1a scoreboard now: WS4.4 ✓ (substantive + amendment + nits) / PR-108 ✓ / t9 ✓ / t12 ✓ / t20 ✓ / WS3.3 ✓ (residual landing now reflected). Outstanding: Lunar WS4.1 (still uncommitted), Sparking t13 in-flight (now split into t13a partial + t13b deferred per their 22:14:30Z scope refinement), SVW t10 lesson-plan-prompt in-flight. WS4.5 (my next critical-path step) becomes openable once Lunar lands WS4.1. Standing by; will pace next-cycle entry against remaining context budget per PDR-063 post-commit re-evaluation.
